name: Crockpot Corned Beef and Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a removable crockpot liner with the cabbage on top.
2. Cut the meat to fit into the pot if necessary.
3. Place the liner in the base of the crockpot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 10-12 hours, or high for 6-7 hours, or use the auto setting for 6-8 hours.
(Note: This recipe is provided by Rec.food.recipes. Please allow several days for submission to appear.)
